name: Infinity War Land
short_description: "Infinity War Land" is a pixel-style Roguelite game that combines exciting shooting gameplay, strategic weapon upgrades and dungeon exploration elements.
detailed_description:
In this doomsday world ravaged by war, you will become the last light of hope. As a well-equipped warrior, you must fight your way out of 10 intricate battlefields. The mysterious dungeon is full of traps and enemies, and each battlefield is a unique challenge. As you go deeper, the enemies will become stronger and more cunning. Hordes of monsters will come from all directions, and mysterious bosses are eyeing in the dark. But don't worry, you are not fighting alone. The treasure chests scattered along the way contain powerful weapons and equipment, waiting to be discovered and used by you. Every adventure is a unique experience. You need to weigh whether to increase the power of existing weapons or try new weapon combinations. Focus on offensive skills or choose auxiliary abilities with more survival value. Every choice may determine your life or death.

Features:

[Shocking battlefield experience]
• Explore 10 unique large maps, each area is a new challenge
• Avoid deadly blood-reducing traps and find hidden treasure chests with powerful equipment
• Advanced automatic aiming technology allows you to focus on tactical operations and enjoy the pleasure of striking
• Perfect gamepad support with plug-and-play capability for more immersive control experience

[Epic combat system]
• 12 powerful long-range weapons can be upgraded to 10 levels, from ordinary to legendary
• 5 melee rotating attack weapons can be upgraded to 10 levels, 360° all-round defense
• 5 tactical auxiliary skills can be upgraded to 10 levels to control the rhythm of the battlefield

[Thrilling duel]
• Face the witty and cunning monsters and powerful bosses, and experience exciting team battles
• 21 special achievements are waiting for you to challenge, showing the strongest strength

[Advanced development]
• Explore treasures, collect resources, and upgrade weapons
• Build your own strongest arsenal
